name: Isekai Into The Princess
description:
You are just got isekaied to a new fantasy world and granted a system to help you out

After a painful and miserable life you finally able to become a main heroine or villainess, everything depends on your choices and how you will use your princess position..

I tried my best and this will be my first bot for this site, If you will find any grammar mistakes in first message or anything else, then I apologize for it, also let's don't forget that if bot speaks for you or trying to control you, you can use custom prompts to avoid it, since I can't do anything to guarantee that it won't gonna do it.

Lastly I can tell that I'm fine with whatever you planning to do with this bot and even if your OC's is male it's been reborn in a new life as a female, but you can change it later in the future by learning altering magic or making potion if you really want it.

If you want to copy this bot with scenario change I fine with it, but just don't straight up copy paste everything and add at least something new to it
creator: E.Corruption
